title: trisetaria forskahlii
intro: Trisetaria forskahlii, also known as Coleus forskohlii, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical India and other parts of Asia. It is widely used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its high concentration of forskolin, a compound that has been shown to have various health benefits. Forskolin has been found to aid in weight loss, improve cardiovascular health, and increase testosterone levels, among other benefits. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as capsules, tablets, and teas, which can be used to extract its medicinal properties.
